overview: A fully functional Madrasa Management System with role-based login for Admin, Teacher (Ustaad), and Parent. Features attendance tracking with WhatsApp alerts, fee management with reminders, Sabak progress tracking, notices, gallery, and parent contact system — all powered by local storage for instant persistence.
features: Role-based login: Admin (full access), Teacher (class-scoped), Parent (mobile number, read-only)
Attendance marking with WhatsApp alert simulation for absent students
Monthly fee tracking with Paid/Pending status and WhatsApp reminder button
Sabak/Quran progress tracking with lesson name, progress %, and remarks
Notice board: Admin creates notices, all users read; WhatsApp share button
Gallery: Admin uploads (UI), all users view in grid layout
Parent contact system with Call and WhatsApp buttons
All data persists in localStorage — no reset on refresh
Sidebar text visibility fix and dropdown z-index fix
